commands.name: decrypt

options.name: --audit-log
options.description:
Write detailed audit information to a separate log 
file. Rolls on 10 MB with up to 7 retained files.

options.name: --id
options.description:
The id of the key to use for decryption.(default: 
"")

options.name: --key
options.description:
The file containing the RSA private key in XML or PEM 
format

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output directory or file path (default: adds 
.decrypted to original filename)

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Fail immediately on first decryption error (default: 
false, continues processing)

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description:
Path to encrypted log file, for a directory append 
<PATH>\*.log or <PATH>\*.txt (Not recursive)

commands.description: Decrypt encrypted log files using an RSA private key

commands.name: generate

options.name: --format
options.description:
The encoding format (Xml or Pem) for the RSA keys 
(default: Xml)

options.name: --key-size
options.description: The size of the RSA key in bits (default: 2048)

options.name: --output
options.description: The output path to write the public/private key pair

commands.description: Generate a new RSA key pair for log encryption
